sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁבץ

Transliteration: shâbats

Phonetic: shaw-bats'

BDB Definition:

  1. to weave in checkered or plaited work or pattern (meaning probable)
    1. (Piel) to weave, plait
    2. (Pual) inwoven, set (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2320

Part(s) of speech: Verb
